title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after the latest deployment.

title: Payment gateway timeout issue
description: Payment process fails due to timeout errors during checkout.

title: Profile image upload error
description: Customers cannot upload profile pictures in the dashboard.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: Sales data is not updating correctly in the admin dashboard.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: System fails to send email notifications after order confirmation.

title: Slow website performance
description: Website loading speed is very slow during peak hours.

title: 404 error on blog pages
description: Some blog URLs return 404 error unexpectedly.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Reset password links are expiring immediately after generation.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: UI elements overlap on smaller screen devices.

title: Search feature not returning results
description: Search queries return empty results even for valid keywords.

title: Admin role permission issue
description: Admin users cannot access user management section.

title: Invoice PDF download failed
description: Invoice PDF is not generating for completed orders.

title: API authentication error
description: Third-party API integration fails due to authentication error.

title: Data export CSV incorrect format
description: Exported CSV file contains mismatched column headers.

title: Session timeout too short
description: User sessions expire within 2 minutes of inactivity.
